CustomField.formula:
Agency_Street1__c + IF( ISBLANK(Agency_Street2__c) , '', ',' + Agency_Street2__c ) + IF( ISBLANK( Agency_City__c ) , '', ', '+Agency_City__c) + IF( ISBLANK( Agency_State__c ) , '', ', '+Agency_State__c) + IF( ISBLANK( Agency_Zip_Code__c ) , '', ', '+Agency_Zip_Code__c) + IF( ISBLANK( Secondary_Street1__c) , '', '
'+Secondary_Street1__c) + IF( ISBLANK( Secondary_City__c) , '', ', '+Secondary_City__c) + IF( ISBLANK( Secondary_Province__c) , '', ','+Secondary_Province__c) + IF( ISBLANK( Secondary_Postal_Code__c ) , '', ', '+Secondary_Postal_Code__c)
CustomField.label: Agency Address
